TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Mulatu_Teshome, title = Mulatu_Teshome, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mulatu_Teshome} }

S.FORM: = Mulatu Teshome = Mulatu Teshome Mntucing hngkawas 1955 idas 1 jiyax 1 ka Mulatu Teshome ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Ethiopia ta sayang o kiya ka Mulatu Teshome, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 10 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Mulatu Teshome = Mulatu Teshome Wotu (kari Amharic: ŠąôŠąčŠČĪ ŠČįŠąĺŠąė; kngkawas 1957-) ka Ethiopia Seyji Jnwu, brah Ethiopia Soto. Kngdusan Mulatu Teshome pa mntuting Ethiopia Volega Sng Algio. Kngkawas 1976, Mulatu Teshome puda hnyuwan Kongpaysng musa Cyokoku muyas, mniq Pyasan Sweyweyn Kari Peycing Rayhwabu 1 Si (Pyasan Tubeyhing Kari Peycing Kari Han Cinsyo Sweyweyn saya) smluhay lxayan kari Telu. Kngkawas 1977 mtmay Pyasan Tubeyhing Peycing Ceweysi muyas, kngkawas 1982 wada mangal Sweys Sweywey, kngkawas 1985 dhuq kngkawas 1991 mniq Pyasan Tubeyhing Kwoci Cngcsi lmutuc muyas Dungan, brah dhuq bukuy u wada mangal Swos mi Hakasey Sweywey. Kngkawas 1991 cida, Mulatu Teshome u spuda Cancansyeyn mtmay Ethiopia Waycyawbu, ini qbsiyaq daw wada mkala Smmalu Cngce Mi Peysyuns Scang. Bukuy daw, Mulatu Teshome pa brah dhuq bukuy u wada ngalan Tnpusu Nihong, Australia, Cyokoku dqnlhangan niyi na Tas, ngalan Ethiopia Ryeynpang Seyhu Keyjay Pkrana Mi Msupu Qmpahbu Huku Bucyo, Noyeybu Bucyo, kngkawas 2002 idas 10 prading daw ngalan Gikay Ryeynpang Ying Gicyo. Mulatu Teshome kngkawas 2013 idas 10 diyax 7 cida wada mangal seyngkyo burah Soto Ethiopia, lmutuc rmirih mn12 kngkawas qnbsyaqan mnSoto ka Girma Wolde Giorgis. Kngkawas 2018 idas 10 diyax 25 cida, Mulatu Teshome pa wada pkla kari malax qpahun Soto, ana so ini uda pkla pusu niya, binaw snhiyun ta ida quri so muda psbalay uuda mcida ka ccng ryeynmong. Mulatu Teshome u niqan 1 laqi niya snaw.
S.PHON: = mulatu t…ôsńßom…ô = mulatu t…ôsńßom…ô mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * ka mulatu t…ôsńßom…ô ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan …ôtńßiopia ta sajaŇč o kija ka mulatu t…ôsńßom…ô, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = mulatu t…ôsńßom…ô = mulatu t…ôsńßom…ô wotu (ka…ĺi amńßa…ĺi ¶: *** ***; kŇčkawas ****-) ka …ôtńßiopia s…ô…üi …ünwu, b…ĺańß …ôtńßiopia soto. kŇčdusan mulatu t…ôsńßom…ô pa mntutiŇč …ôtńßiopia *ol…ôga sŇč algio. kŇčkawas ****, mulatu t…ôsńßom…ô puda ńßnjuwan koŇčpajsŇč musa ¶jokoku mujas, mniq pjasan sw…ôw…ôn ka…ĺi p…ô ¶iŇč …ĺajńßwabu * si (pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ka…ĺi p…ô ¶iŇč ka…ĺi ńßan ¶insjo sw…ôw…ôn saja) smluńßaj lxajan ka…ĺi t…ôlu. kŇčkawas **** mtmaj pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč p…ô ¶iŇč ¶…ôw…ôsi mujas, kŇčkawas **** wada maŇčal sw…ôs sw…ôw…ô, kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** mniq pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč kwo ¶i ¶Ňč ¶si lmutu ¶ mujas duŇčan, b…ĺańß dńßuq bukuj u wada maŇčal swos mi ńßakas…ô sw…ôw…ô. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, mulatu t…ôsńßom…ô u spuda ¶an ¶ansj…ôn mtmaj …ôtńßiopia waj ¶jawbu, ini qbsijaq daw wada mkala smmalu ¶Ňč ¶…ô mi p…ôsjuns s ¶aŇč. bukuj daw, mulatu t…ôsńßom…ô pa b…ĺańß dńßuq bukuj u wada Ňčalan tnpusu nińßoŇč, aust…ĺalia, ¶jokoku dqnlńßaŇčan niji na tas, Ňčalan …ôtńßiopia …ĺj…ônpaŇč s…ôńßu k…ô…üaj pk…ĺana mi msupu qmpańßbu ńßuku bu ¶jo, noj…ôbu bu ¶jo, kŇčkawas **** idas ** p…ĺadiŇč daw Ňčalan gikaj …ĺj…ônpaŇč jiŇč gi ¶jo. mulatu t…ôsńßom…ô kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax * ¶ida wada maŇčal s…ôŇčkjo bu…ĺańß soto …ôtńßiopia, lmutu ¶ …ĺmi…ĺińß mn** kŇčkawas qnbsjaqan mnsoto ka gi…ĺma wold…ô gio…ĺgis. kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ** ¶ida, mulatu t…ôsńßom…ô pa wada pkla ka…ĺi malax qpańßun soto, ana so ini uda pkla pusu nija, binaw snńßijun ta ida qu…ĺi so muda psbalaj uuda m ¶ida ka ¶ ¶Ňč …ĺj…ônmoŇč. mulatu t…ôsńßom…ô u niqan * laqi nija snaw.
S.FORM: = Mulatu Teshome = Mulatu Teshome Mntucing hngkawas 1955 idas 1 jiyax 1 ka Mulatu Teshome ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Ethiopia ta sayang o kiya ka Mulatu Teshome, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 10 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Mulatu Teshome = Mulatu Teshome Wotu (kari Amharic: ŠąôŠąčŠČĪ ŠČįŠąĺŠąė; kngkawas 1957-) ka Ethiopia Seyji Jnwu, brah Ethiopia Soto. Kngdusan Mulatu Teshome pa mntuting Ethiopia Volega Sng Algio. Kngkawas 1976, Mulatu Teshome puda hnyuwan Kongpaysng musa Cyokoku muyas, mniq Pyasan Sweyweyn Kari Peycing Rayhwabu 1 Si (Pyasan Tubeyhing Kari Peycing Kari Han Cinsyo Sweyweyn saya) smluhay lxayan kari Telu. Kngkawas 1977 mtmay Pyasan Tubeyhing Peycing Ceweysi muyas, kngkawas 1982 wada mangal Sweys Sweywey, kngkawas 1985 dhuq kngkawas 1991 mniq Pyasan Tubeyhing Kwoci Cngcsi lmutuc muyas Dungan, brah dhuq bukuy u wada mangal Swos mi Hakasey Sweywey. Kngkawas 1991 cida, Mulatu Teshome u spuda Cancansyeyn mtmay Ethiopia Waycyawbu, ini qbsiyaq daw wada mkala Smmalu Cngce Mi Peysyuns Scang. Bukuy daw, Mulatu Teshome pa brah dhuq bukuy u wada ngalan Tnpusu Nihong, Australia, Cyokoku dqnlhangan niyi na Tas, ngalan Ethiopia Ryeynpang Seyhu Keyjay Pkrana Mi Msupu Qmpahbu Huku Bucyo, Noyeybu Bucyo, kngkawas 2002 idas 10 prading daw ngalan Gikay Ryeynpang Ying Gicyo. Mulatu Teshome kngkawas 2013 idas 10 diyax 7 cida wada mangal seyngkyo burah Soto Ethiopia, lmutuc rmirih mn12 kngkawas qnbsyaqan mnSoto ka Girma Wolde Giorgis. Kngkawas 2018 idas 10 diyax 25 cida, Mulatu Teshome pa wada pkla kari malax qpahun Soto, ana so ini uda pkla pusu niya, binaw snhiyun ta ida quri so muda psbalay uuda mcida ka ccng ryeynmong. Mulatu Teshome u niqan 1 laqi niya snaw.
